author: kevaundray
content: Hey, good question -- F and D aren't required for the STF, so we would need a reason to require all zkVMs to support it

author: lu_pinto
content:
hmm ok, the fact that creates extra work for provers is a valid concern. Just wondering if this is not limiting diversity with some compiler tooling and we should choose to relax as much as possible rather than restricting. But as I said I don't have a valid use case so can't push for that.

Am also thinking, that adding a new supported extension to the standard does not break backwards compatibility for provers I guess, rather than dropping it - so it can be added later if needed.
